diff_aware_contract: Mechanism (ii): inspector-side tagging. Each finding in --changed-files mode carries an explicit introduced_in_diff field. Absent/null/untagged findings are non-blocking per AC-2.6 default-safe rule.

summary.verdict_rationale: Zero blocking cleanliness issues introduced in this diff. One minor advisory finding with introduced_in_diff: true: tests/generated/20260524-125300-B/README.md has a stale auto-section (Total files: 1) vs actual content (9 files). This is a doc-sync regeneration task, not a structural violation. All other changed files are correctly placed, correctly named, actively referenced, and contain no temp/build artifacts tracked in git. The __pycache__ directories exist on disk but are gitignored and not tracked. scripts/execute-push.py has confirmed functional references in commands/push.md.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex (gpt-5.5, xhigh reasoning, 124,686 tokens) raised 2 findings with PROPOSED_FIX and 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY. Finding 1: tests/generated/20260524-125300-B/README.md auto-section is stale (Total files: 1 vs actual 9 files) — PROPOSED_FIX applied: added docs_categorization finding with introduced_in_diff: true, severity: minor, action: regenerate_readme. Finding 2: scope wording in the draft underreported generated metadata files (README.md, INDEX.md, manifest.json) in the B batch — PROPOSED_FIX applied: scope now lists all generated files in the B batch explicitly. OBSERVATION_ONLY (no PROPOSED_FIX): no Safety Rules violations from proposed deletion — logged and confirmed, no deletions proposed in this report.
